data.title: Restora Austin Joins Kalon Aesthetics, a National Network of Premier Plastic Surgery and Advanced Aesthetic Practices
data.description: Kalon Aesthetics, a renowned national plastic surgery and advanced aesthetics network, revealed a recent collaboration with Restora Austin, a leading plastic surgery and aesthetic medicine practice based in Austin, Texas. Restora Austin, well-regarded for its exceptional surgical results, innovative techniques, and patient-focused approach, aligns perfectly with Kalon Aesthetics' vision. This partnership signifies a significant expansion for Kalon Aesthetics in Texas, enhancing its position in one of the rapidly growing markets.

data.title: Dogecoin Jumps 15% In 2 Days: What Is Going On?
data.description: Dogecoin (DOGE) has been making significant strides with a price of $0.09586 and a market cap of $14.7 billion, marking a 3% increase. Meanwhile, Shiba Inu (SHIB) is priced at $0.055643 with a market cap of $3.3 billion, showing a 1.4% uptrend. In contrast, Pepe (PEPE) is at $0.053550 with a market cap of $1.5 billion, experiencing a 1.4% decline. Despite historically low social sentiment, Dogecoin is gaining traction, a trend often seen before a contrarian rally. Trader Tardigrade observed Dogecoin’s brief rally into Ichimoku cloud resistance, followed by a sharp rejection, indicating a short-term bearish outlook. This suggests Dogecoin attempted a bullish move but was swiftly pushed back. Currently, DOGE is finding support at the Kijun-sen. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Tech Innovator Kerry W. Kirby to Discuss The Future of Multifamily Operating Models in an Autonomous World
data.description: Today, 365 Connect, a prominent player in the multifamily industry known for its AI-driven marketing and resident engagement solutions, revealed that CEO Kerry W. Kirby is set to join a live webinar discussing The Future of Multifamily. The event will take place on March 5, 2026.

OIL SPIKE IS THE REAL RISK FOR U.S. ECONOMY, BOFA SAYS The conflict involving the U.S. and Iran hasn’t significantly changed the economic outlook, according to Bank of America. Analyst Meghan Swiber said risks to the U.S. economy remain limited unless oil prices surge sharply.

data.title: UK supermarket wins trademark dispute against Iceland; British grocery store can't trademark the name of the country.
data.description: Is it permissible for a company to trademark the name of a nation? In the instance of Iceland, the UK-based supermarket, the response is negative.

data.title: Conduent Survey Reveals Employers Struggling to Balance Rising Healthcare Costs and Employee Expectations for Comprehensive Health & Wellness Benefits
data.description: A recent survey conducted by Conduent in Florham Park, New Jersey, indicates that employers are finding it challenging to manage the increasing healthcare expenses while meeting the comprehensive health and wellness benefit expectations of their employees. The survey highlights the struggle faced by employers in striking a balance between rising healthcare costs and fulfilling employee needs. The findings shed light on the difficulties faced by companies in providing satisfactory health and wellness benefits amidst the increasing financial burden.

data.title: LiCAP Technologies Scales Domestic Manufacturing and Expands Ultracapacitor Line to Meet Rising Energy Storage Demand
data.description: A company specializing in clean tech for advanced battery electrode production, LiCAP Technologies, has recently revealed a significant expansion of its operations. The company secured a sizable 40,500-square-foot industrial facility in Sacramento, California as part of this expansion. This new development signifies a substantial growth for the company's manufacturing capabilities.

data.title: Uber Joins American Red Cross Disaster Responder Program
data.description: A significant total commitment of $650,000, comprising of a $500,000 pledge and $150,000 worth of ride and delivery credits, has been made to enhance the response to major disasters. This support has enabled a response to almost double the number of major disasters compared to ten years ago. The American Red Cross has acknowledged Uber for providing this crucial aid. The announcement was made in Washington on March 5, 2026.

data.title: WHEN SHOULD HOUSTON GARDENERS START SPRING PLANTING? CORNELIUS NURSERY SAYS NOW
data.description: In North Richland Hills, Texas on March 5, 2026, gardening experts from Cornelius Nursery provided valuable insights for the upcoming spring season. Known as a Texas Treasure Business, the nursery offered timing recommendations, suggested must-plant varieties, and tips for gaining an early advantage in gardening. Local families were encouraged to prepare for the season with expert advice to enhance their gardening experience.

data.title: "ORIJEN™ Unleashes FRESHPREY, Elevating Fresh Pet Food to New Heights"
data.description: ORIJEN has recently ventured into the realm of fresh pet food with the introduction of FRESHPREY, an innovative line set to establish a new standard in the industry. These biologically appropriate recipes are protein-rich, aligning with the natural dietary needs of pets. To inaugurate this new line, ORIJEN embarked on a journey to the Colorado mountains, reaching heights of 12,000 feet. This venture marks the beginning of "World's Most Extreme" line of pet food products, offering a unique and natural approach to pet nutrition.

data.title: DM20.ai Launches World's First Multi-Model AI Platform Exclusively for Direct Mail Performance Optimization
data.description: DM20.ai has officially launched in Clearwater, Florida on March 5, 2026, providing a unique AI platform powered by Direct Mail Intelligence and advanced models like ChatGPT, Gemini Pro, and Claude Sonnet. This platform is the first of its kind globally and aims to revolutionize the industry.
